recommendations.title: Valley Girl
recommendations.overview: Julie, a girl from the valley, meets Randy, a punk from the city. They are from different worlds and find love. Somehow they need to stay together in spite of her trendy, shallow friends.

recommendations.title: Real Genius
recommendations.overview: When teenage geniuses Mitch Taylor and Chris Knight, working on an advanced laser project, learn that the military wants to use it as a weapon, they decide to thwart the plan.

recommendations.title: Material Girls
recommendations.overview: Two wealthy sisters, both heiresses to their family's cosmetics fortune, are given a wake-up call when a scandal and ensuing investigation strip them of their wealth.

recommendations.title: If These Walls Could Talk 2
recommendations.overview: The stories of three lesbian couples -- who live in the same house at different periods of time -- who are at a crossroads in their lives. In 1961, Edith loses her lover, Abby, to a stroke. Linda and Amy struggle with feminist issues in 1972. And, in
recommendations.director: Jane Anderson, Martha Coolidge, Anne Heche

recommendations.title: The Vow

recommendations.title: Out to Sea
recommendations.overview: Care-free Charlie cons his widower brother-in-law Herb into an expenses-paid luxury cruise in search of rich, lonely ladies. The catch is that they are required to be dance hosts! With a tyrannical cruise director, and the luscious Liz and lovely Viv

recommendations.title: The Prince & Me: A Royal Honeymoon
recommendations.overview: At last! The newly crowned King of Denmark, Edward, and his wife and Queen, Dr. Paige Morgan, find time to fly to Belavia for their secret honeymoon. What better way to spend the Christmas holidays than at a fabulous ski resort? But as they take a to

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.

recommendations.title: Fighting with My Family
recommendations.overview: Born into a tight-knit wrestling family, Paige and her brother Zak are ecstatic when they get the once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to try out for the WWE. But when only Paige earns a spot in the competitive training program, she must leave her loved on

recommendations.title: The Ugly Stepsister
recommendations.overview: In a fairy-tale kingdom where beauty is a brutal business, Elvira battles to compete with her incredibly beautiful stepsister, and she will go to any length to catch the prince’s eye.
